SHMI 1.0.2

Package index

Core Workflow

prepare_shmi_inputs()
Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook
build_shmi()
Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs
prepare_shmi_yield()
Prepare crop-specific yield data for SHMI analysis

Sub-index Functions

compute_cover()
Compute the SHMI Cover Sub-index (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence)
compute_diversity()
Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers)
compute_disturbance()
Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric)
compute_orginput()
Compute the Organic Inputs Sub-index (Amendments + Animals)

Helper Functions

download_shmi_example()
Download the example SHMI Excel file
download_shmi_template()
Download a blank SHMI Excel template

Validation Functions

validate_excel_input()
Validate SHMI Excel Input File
validate_shmi_input()
Validate SHMI Input Tables

Plotting Functions

plot_shmi_gauge()
Plot SHMI gauge panels (Cover, Diversity, Inverse Disturbance, OrgInputs, Overall SHMI)
plot_shmi_lollipop()
Plot SHMI values for multiple management units (lollipop chart)
plot_yield_stability()
Plot yield stability using Taylor's Law

On this page

Developed by Daniel Manter, Jennifer Moore.
